name: Cranberry Raisin Squares
recipeInstructions:
Divide the pastry dough into half. Roll out each portion into rectangles measuring 10 inches by 15 inches, large enough to fit a cookie pan.
Place one rolled dough rectangle in the bottom of the pan and spread with prepared filling. Cover with remaining crust.
Score the surface of the pie with a fork or knife to allow steam to escape.
To create a golden-brown crust glaze, brush with milk before baking at 425°F for 30 minutes or until the crust is fully baked. This yields approximately 24 squares.
From "Make It Better with CRANBERRIES"
Cape Cod Cranberry Growers' Association, Founded 1888 P.O. Box 270 Carver, MA 02330
